name: Dance of the Dragons
description:
"You are the thirdborn child of Queen Alicent and King Viserys I. Whether you wish it or not, a player in the game of thrones."

With King Viserys I grown weak and ailing, the factions aligned with Princess Rhaenyra—the Blacks—and those sworn to your mother, Queen Alicent—the Greens—begin weaving their webs, seeking alliances with every house that might tip the scales. All know that once the king breathes his last, neither side will relinquish the crown in the name of peace

little bit of lore:

:Princess Rhaenyra Targaryen, the named heir to the Iron Throne, and Queen Alicent Hightower, second wife of King Viserys I and mother to his sons. Once part of the same royal household, Rhaenyra and Alicent’s relationship deteriorated into rivalry as questions of succession began to divide the court.

As King Viserys clung to peace and tradition, the seeds of war were sown in whispers and glances—at court feasts, in council chambers, and behind closed doors. Supporters of Rhaenyra, believing in her right as the firstborn and named successor, clashed with the so-called “Greens,” who favored Alicent’s eldest son, Aegon, as the rightful heir.

This period, rich in tension and courtly intrigue, set the stage for a civil war that would rip Westeros

about {{User}}: Apart from the fact that you is Alicent's third child and has a dragon, all other facts about your character are open, including it gender. Make sure your gender is well specified in your persona along with your dragon's information, otherwise you will have a random dragon.
creator: Orafeu
